prompt: Compare average monthly revenue between store regions for 2022 and 2023
visualization_goal: Grouped bar chart comparing average monthly revenue per region between 2022 and 2023
error:
Error accessing data: Binder Error: Values list "s" does not have a column named "Sold_Date"

LINE 1: SELECT st.region, YEAR(CAST(s.Sold_Date AS DATE)) AS year, ROUND(AVG(s.monthly_rev)...
                                    ^
sql_query:
SELECT st.region, YEAR(CAST(s.Sold_Date AS DATE)) AS year, ROUND(AVG(s.monthly_rev), 2) AS avg_monthly_revenue 
FROM (
    SELECT Store_Number, 
           YEAR(CAST(Sold_Date AS DATE)) AS yr, 
           DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(Sold_Date AS DATE)) AS month, 
           SUM(Total_Sale_Value) AS monthly_rev 
    FROM sales 
    WHERE YEAR(CAST(Sold_Date AS DATE)) IN (2022, 2023) 
    GROUP BY Store_Number, yr, month
) s 
JOIN stores st ON s.Store_Number = st.Store_Number 
GROUP BY st.region, year 
ORDER BY st.region, year
